name_en: Exclusive Launch Model: M41245 [Premium Enhanced Version]. Leather is authentic factory Italian Grade A diamond quilted leather, with boutique synchronized chip technology. Focuses on quality, all-steel hardware, fabric, craftsmanship, edge painting, and Grade A high-quality output. Fully upgraded again. Photos match the product. Includes full packaging set. Size: 29*21*12CM
